title: lobelia myrtifolia
intro: Lobelia myrtifolia is a flowering plant species belonging to the Lobeliaceae family, commonly known as the blue lobelia or lobelia. It is native to tropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia myrtifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its use as a treatment for muscle spasms and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Lobelia myrtifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
